name: Saramonic WiTalk9-3S 3-Person Full-Duplex Wireless Intercom System with Single-Ear Headsets
description: The WiTalk9-3S 3-Person Full-Duplex Wireless Intercom System is a DCT-based system that provides reliable and clear communication in live-event production applications without requiring a hub or bodypack.

features.Key Features: Production Crew Communication (3 People) | 1 True-Wireless Master Headset | 2 True-Wireless Remote Headsets | Full-Duplex Communication up to 1640' | Adjustable Boom, Auto-Mutes when Up | On-Ear Foam & Over-Ear Gel Earpads | Includes Batteries, Charging Station | Expandable System, No Hub Required | iOS and Android App Control
features.What’s In The Box: Saramonic WiTalk9-3S 3-Person Full-Duplex Wireless Intercom System with Single-Ear Headsets (1.9 GHz) | WiTalk9-SMH Single-Ear Master Headset | 2 x WiTalk9-SMH Single-Ear Remote Headset | 6 x WiTalk9-BP Battery | WiTalk-CB6 6-Slot Charging Bay | Power Supply with International Adapters | 3 x On-Ear Foam Earpad | 3 x Over-Ear Cooling-Gel Earpad | 3 x Headset Temple Pad | 3 x Foam Windscreen | 3 x Number Sticker Sheet | 3 x Drawstring Pouch | Carrying Case
